openai.summary: GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna remain live in the docs and on the Codex OAuth lane; no new OpenAI subscription-lane change was detected versus 2026-07-14.

anthropic.summary: Anthropic's overview still presents Claude Fable 5, Claude Mythos 5, and Claude Sonnet 5. On the Ireland Claude Code subscription lane, claude-fable-5 now returns OK again, claude-sonnet-5 still returns OK, and claude-mythos-5 still returns 404/no access. The live claude_local adapter catalog now includes claude-sonnet-5.

liveProbes.claude-mythos-5: 404/no access on this Claude Code lane

google.summary: Google still exposes gemini-3.5-flash, gemini-3.1-flash-lite, gemini-3.1-flash-live-preview, gemini-3.5-live-translate-preview, and gemini-3-flash-preview in the public model docs. The live gemini_local adapter catalog now lists every one of those except gemini-3-flash-preview, but agy 1.1.2 no longer accepts several raw docs model IDs and instead exposes alias-based model names via `agy models`.

liveProbes.gemini-3.5-flash: CLI gate: raw doc ID invalid on agy 1.1.2; alias `Gemini 3.5 Flash (Medium)` returns OK
liveProbes.gemini-3.1-flash-live-preview: CLI gate: raw doc ID invalid on agy 1.1.2
liveProbes.gemini-3.5-live-translate-preview: CLI gate: raw doc ID invalid on agy 1.1.2
liveProbes.gemini-3-flash-preview: CLI gate: raw doc ID invalid on agy 1.1.2

xai.summary: xAI docs still present Grok 4.5 and the broader Grok 4.20 family. The local Grok host remains unauthenticated for subscription-lane probing; its unauthenticated surface now defaults to grok-4.5 and lists grok-composer-2.5-fast, but no EU auth flip was confirmed from Ireland.
xai.hostProbe: grok models -> not authenticated; default model grok-4.5; available model grok-composer-2.5-fast

ollama.skipReason: Wednesday fire; the local/Ollama catalog leg runs only on Monday fires per the operator directive.
ollama.installedCatalog: Unavailable on 2026-07-13: `ollama list` and `curl http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags` did not return within 15 seconds.
ollama.onlineWatchSummary: Carry-forward from 2026-07-13: no local-model alert opened from the Ollama library pass. The front page still highlighted Gemma 4 (e2b/e4b/12b, updated 1 week ago) and Qwen 3.5 (0.8b/2b/4b/9b, updated 1 month ago) as the strongest storm-resilience candidates under the Monday catalog-only rule.

openRadar.grok-4.5: Unchanged: docs list it and the unauthenticated Grok host now defaults to grok-4.5, but no EU subscription-lane auth flip was confirmed. TSBC-988 remains the parked reprobe issue.
openRadar.gemini-catalog-drift: Narrowed 2026-07-15: the live gemini_local catalog now lists gemini-3.5-flash, gemini-3.5-live-translate-preview, gemini-3.1-flash-lite, and gemini-3.1-flash-live-preview; gemini-3-flash-preview still remains missing.
openRadar.agy-gemini-alias-gate: NEW 2026-07-15: agy 1.1.2 keeps the Gemini lane alive but no longer accepts several raw docs model IDs (`gemini-3.5-flash`, `gemini-3.1-flash-live-preview`, `gemini-3.5-live-translate-preview`, `gemini-3-flash-preview`). Alias probing such as `Gemini 3.5 Flash (Medium)` still returns OK.
openRadar.claude-mythos-5: Unchanged: docs and claude_local catalog list it, but Claude Code returns 404/no access on this lane; this still matches Anthropic's invitation-only positioning rather than a public GA flip.

changesSincePrevious: agy upgraded from 1.1.1 to 1.1.2; the Gemini lane still works, but raw docs model IDs now hard-fail on the CLI for gemini-3.5-flash, gemini-3.1-flash-live-preview, gemini-3.5-live-translate-preview, and gemini-3-flash-preview while alias probing still returns OK.

The live gemini_local adapter catalog now lists gemini-3.5-flash, gemini-3.5-live-translate-preview, gemini-3.1-flash-lite, and gemini-3.1-flash-live-preview; only gemini-3-flash-preview remains missing from the prior drift set.
The live claude_local adapter catalog now lists claude-sonnet-5.
claude-fable-5 recovered from yesterday's 429 usage-limit response and now returns OK again on the Ireland Claude Code subscription lane.
The unauthenticated grok CLI surface now defaults to grok-4.5 and lists grok-composer-2.5-fast; yesterday the same surface defaulted to grok-composer-2.5-fast and exposed grok-build.

weeklyLiveness.line: model-watch alive: 3/7 fires this week, changes: 3
